output.final_deliverable:
1) Exact H1 text from https://example.com:
   - H1: "Example Domain"
   - Source: https://example.com

2) External link on https://example.com (exact URL and domain):
   - External link URL: https://iana.org/domains/example
   - External link domain: iana.org
   - Source (page that contains this link): https://example.com

3) One URL citation for each visited page (in order visited):
   1. https://example.com
   2. https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved

Additional extracted fact (from visits):
   - H1 on https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved (verification): "IANA-managed Reserved Domains"
   - Source: https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved
output.action_summary: From the provided visit results: example.com has H1 text "Example Domain" and contains an external link to https://iana.org/domains/example (domain: iana.org). The two visited page citations are https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. All values are taken from the supplied visit outputs.

result.title: Consolidate results and produce final required outputs (H1 from example.com, external link domain from example.com, one citation per visited page)

details.intent: After the visit nodes complete, consolidate extracted data into the final required outputs: (1) exact H1 text from https://example.com, (2) exact domain of the external link from https://example.com, and (3) one URL citation for each visited page (https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved).
details.extraction_plan: Receive parsed outputs from the two visit nodes. Normalize nothing except extracting domain from the external link URL (preserve case of domain as found). Assemble final response fields, include a brief verification note that the example external link URL (if present) was taken verbatim and that the IANA page citation corresponds to the visited URL. If the external link from example.com does not match the IANA reserved page, note the exact external URL as evidence.
details.verification_steps: 1) Confirm H1 text is non-empty and matches the captured string from the example.com visit. 2) Confirm external_link_domain was derived from the verbatim href captured. 3) Confirm that both page citations are the exact visited URLs. 4) If any extraction failed, list which field failed and why.
details.why_this_reduces_uncertainty: This consolidation step ensures the final outputs are consistent, that each returned value is backed by a specific visited page, and that any mismatch between example.com's external link and the IANA site is called out explicitly.
details.goal: Consolidate results and produce final required outputs (H1 from example.com, external link domain from example.com, one citation per visited page)

3e19abc8-9a05-4a56-9a4c-fbd812f1100f.title: Visit https://example.com and extract exact H1, external link URL & domain, and page citation

details.intent: Retrieve the exact H1 text from the page, locate the external link shown on the page (the 'Learn more' link), extract the exact external link URL and its domain, and return a single URL citation for the visited page.
target_facts: exact_h1_text (string) — the H1 element text exactly as rendered on https://example.com
external_link_url (string) — the exact URL of the external link found on the page (copy exact URL from the link)
external_link_domain (string) — the domain portion of external_link_url (e.g., iana.org)
page_url_citation (string) — one URL citation for the visited page (https://example.com)
details.extraction_plan: Visit the provided URL. Parse the page to find the first <h1> element and capture its innerText exactly (including case and punctuation). Find the outward-facing anchor link(s) on the page; capture the exact href value of the external link labelled 'Learn more' (or the only external link). Derive the domain from that href (use the host portion). Record the visited page URL as the citation. Save raw snippets for verification.
details.verification_steps: 1) Ensure H1 text matches exact characters from the page (no trimming beyond preserving visible whitespace). 2) Ensure the external link URL is taken verbatim from the anchor href in the page. 3) Extract domain using the exact host component of the href and verify it's well-formed.
details.why_this_reduces_uncertainty: Directly visiting the page and extracting DOM values prevents relying on cached or paraphrased memory and ensures exact text and exact link URL/domain are returned. Vector DB will be auto-queried for related stored links as part of the visit node per system policy.
details.goal: Visit https://example.com and extract exact H1, external link URL & domain, and page citation
details.original_goal: Visit https://example.com and extract exact H1, external link URL & domain, and page citation
details.parent_goal: Visit https://example.com and https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved. Return: (1) the exact H1 text from example.com, (2) the exact domain of the external link from example.com, and (3) one URL citation for each visited page.

action_result.intent: Retrieve the exact H1 text from the page, locate the external link shown on the page (the 'Learn more' link), extract the exact external link URL and its domain, and return a single URL citation for the visited page.

adbef887-441b-4c6f-8ce7-e26d9ce0eae1.title: Visit https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved and capture a URL citation (and page title/H1 for verification)

details.intent: Visit the IANA 'Reserved Domains' page and capture one URL citation for this visited page. Also capture the page title or H1 text for verification against the example.com external link target (if needed).
target_facts: page_url_citation (string) — one URL citation for https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved
page_title_or_h1 (string) — the page title or H1 text to confirm the visit and provide a short verification snippet
details.extraction_plan: Visit the exact URL. Extract the canonical page URL (use the visited URL), capture the <title> and first <h1> if present, and save these as verification fields. Store any links found on the page as link candidates (system will record them in the link store).
details.verification_steps: 1) Confirm successful HTTP response and that the page content is non-empty. 2) Extract title/H1 exactly as rendered. 3) Return the visited URL as the page citation.
details.why_this_reduces_uncertainty: Direct visit ensures the precise URL citation is available and allows cross-checking whether example.com's external link points to a page on IANA or another host. Vector DB will be auto-queried for relevant stored links as part of the visit.
details.goal: Visit https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved and capture a URL citation (and page title/H1 for verification)
details.original_goal: Visit https://www.iana.org/domains/reserved and capture a URL citation (and page title/H1 for verification)
